FlavourText.original:
Our world was dying, but we chose to survive.
We broke free from the chains within.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
我们的世界奄奄一息，但我们选择活下去。
我们挣脱了内心的枷锁。

group.original: Only affects Passives in Medium-Large Ring

translation.zh_cn: 只影响中大环形范围内的天赋
translation.zh_tw: 只會影響中至大範圍內的天賦

group.original: Only affects Passives in Large Ring

translation.zh_cn: 只影响大环形范围内的天赋
translation.zh_tw: 只會影響大範圍內的天賦

group.original: Passives in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree

translation.zh_cn: 未连结至天赋树的技能，仍然可以在范围内配置
translation.zh_tw: 天賦樹中在範圍內未連結的技能仍然可以配置
